hindi: जय भगवद्गीते माता। कृष्ण मुख से निकली ज्ञान दाता॥
english: Victory to the Bhagavad Gita, the mother; bestower of knowledge spoken from Krishna's mouth
roman: Jai Bhagavad Gite Mata, Krishna Mukh Se Nikli Gyan Data

hindi: कुरुक्षेत्र में उपदेश दिया। अर्जुन को ज्ञान का पथ मिला॥
english: The teaching given on Kurukshetra; Arjuna found the path of knowledge
roman: Kurukshetra Mein Upadesh Diya, Arjun Ko Gyan Ka Path Mila

hindi: अठारह अध्याय सात सौ श्लोक। सार सम्पूर्ण जीवन का लोक॥
english: Eighteen chapters and seven hundred verses; the complete essence of worldly life
roman: Atharah Adhyay Saat Sau Shlok, Sar Sampurna Jeevan Ka Lok

hindi: कर्म योग ज्ञान भक्ति मार्ग। गीता दिखाती तीनों मार्ग॥
english: Karma Yoga, Jnana and Bhakti paths; the Gita shows all three paths
roman: Karm Yog Gyan Bhakti Marg, Geeta Dikhati Tinon Marg

hindi: नित्य गीता पाठ जो करे। जीवन के संशय सब हरे॥
english: Whoever recites the Gita daily; all doubts of life are removed
roman: Nitya Geeta Path Jo Kare, Jeevan Ke Sanshay Sab Hare

hindi: गीता चालीसा जो पढ़े। कृष्ण का ज्ञान उसे बढ़े॥
english: Whoever reads the Gita Chalisa; Krishna's wisdom grows in him
roman: Geeta Chalisa Jo Padhe, Krishna Ka Gyan Use Badhe

hindi: जय जय भगवद्गीते माता। जगत को कर्म का ज्ञान दाता॥
english: Victory to the Bhagavad Gita, the mother; giver of the knowledge of action to the world
roman: Jai Jai Bhagavad Gite Mata, Jagat Ko Karm Ka Gyan Data
